news.title: Rupee posts biggest daily gain in 2 months, closes at 94.94 vs USD as RBI ramps up currency defence
news.description: The rupee gained 0.9% to end at 94.9450 per dollar, its biggest gain since April 2. Forward premiums, ‌the cost of hedging ⁠FX ⁠exposure, plunged to 2.67 rupees, the lowest this financial year, down from 2.85 rupees.

news.title: Rate hikes are coming, RBI has sent a clear signal, says Anubhuti Sahay, Standard Chartered
news.description: Despite holding the repo rate steady, the Reserve Bank of India's significantly upgraded inflation forecasts signal a strong likelihood of rate hikes from August. news.title: RBI governor says no plans to ease net open position restrictions
news.description: The Reserve Bank of India will maintain its restriction on banks' net open positions. Governor Sanjay Malhotra confirmed no plans exist to discontinue the measure. news.title: R Gandhi calls RBI policy 'on expected lines', sees no immediate rate hike risks
news.description: The Reserve Bank of India has maintained its neutral policy stance and kept interest rates steady. The central bank has adjusted its forecasts for economic growth and inflation. news.title: Court Clears Path For Idaho’s Critical Stibnite Antimony Mine
news.description: A federal district court ruled recently that the Stibnite Gold Project - a key source of domestic antimony - could proceed despite activist opposition.

news.title: ‘Metsochism’
news.description: A new history of the Mets tries to turn the pain of losing into the struggle of class politics.

news.title: Sensex today | Stock Market Highlights: Sensex, Nifty end flat after weak open; Sensex up 14 pts, Nifty gains 11 pts
news.description: Sensex, Nifty, Stock Price Highlights: After a negative opening, benchmarks ended flat. Sensex was up 13.84 pts or 0.02% to end at 74,360.01, Nifty 50 inched up 10.95 pts or 0.05% to 23,416.55.

news.title: Peru’s Politics Are a Disaster, but Does It Matter?
news.description: A runoff election, on June 7th, will decide which of two candidates—down from thirty-six, in the first round of voting—becomes the next Peruvian President. The economy may not notice.

news.title: Silver drops in futures trade on weak global cues, inflation worries
news.description: On the MCX, the white metal for July delivery depreciated by ₹621, or 0.24%, to ₹2,62,337 per kg in a business turnover of 11,830 lots.

news.title: Buy or Sell Silver in 2026? Industrial Demand Surge Meets Macro Risks for Investors
news.description: Silver prices in 2026 are buoyed by strong industrial demand from sectors like solar energy and electronics, despite economic uncertainties. Investors weigh silver's dual role as a safe-haven and industrial commodity.

news.title: ET Alpha Wealth Summit: Edelweiss MF CEO Radhika Gupta on how to build a Rs 100 crore portfolio in 10-11% return world
news.description: Radhika Gupta of Edelweiss MF suggests building a Rs 100 crore corpus is achievable through long-term investing, compounding, and disciplined asset allocation, emphasizing human capital growth for younger investors.

news.title: Hyundai reaffirms Tamil Nadu commitment, plans to make State its flagship EV hub
news.description: Hyundai commits to making Tamil Nadu its flagship EV hub, launching new models and enhancing local manufacturing and workforce development.
